mission.title: ollama: Enable Flash Attention on GGML/GGUF (feature now merged into llama.cpp)
mission.description: Enable Flash Attention on GGML/GGUF (feature now merged into llama.cpp). Requested by 31+ users.

steps.title: Check current ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your ollama version and configuration:
```bash
ollama --version
```
This feature requires a working ollama installation.

steps.title: Review ollama configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant ollama configuration:
Flash Attention has landed in llama.cpp (https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/pull/5021).

The tldr; is simply to pass the -fa flag to llama.cpp’s server.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Enable Flash Attention on GGML/GGUF (feature now merged…
Upgrade ollama to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade ollama:
```bash
# Check current version
ollama --version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/ollama/ollama
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Enable Flash Attention on GGML/GGUF (feature now merged…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
- Add Flash Attention support #4051

Only enabled by default on a supported CUDA version or Metal is detected, configurable via params and the API.

Credit to  who [took my broken idea and made it work](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/issues/4051#issuecomment-2092430887) 🎉
